title: Populate a start date column from timeline column
excerpt: I have set up my projects using a timeline, but I am struggling to report when projects should begin.  There are too many to handle easily in a Gantt chart.  I would like to populate a column that shows just the start da…

posts.author: Brobb (Buffy Robbins)
posts.cookedHtml: I have set up my projects using a timeline, but I am struggling to report when projects should begin. There are too many to handle easily in a Gantt chart. I would like to populate a column that shows just the start date so I can report on that date only. Is there a way to do this?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Brobb

Welcome to the community. There is an app (https://monday.com/marketplace/18) in the marketplace that keeps a timeline in sync with a start and end date and visa versa. Possibly this helps solving your use case.
